hooks.command: echo '📸 Capturing verification screenshot...' && adb exec-out screencap -p > /tmp/stop-verify-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).png 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Screenshot saved' || echo '⚠️ No device connected'
echo '📋 Checking OpenSpec compliance...' && [ -d openspec/changes ] && ls openspec/changes/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'No active OpenSpec changes'
